title: Davinci Neo4j Service - Requirements Document
response:
Feedback Summary (2 comments):

General Comments:
1. I need a way for the neo4j cypher, and the microservice API endpoints to stay in sync, and be autogenerated (when the microservice API endpoing changes, it should automatically update cypher schemas).  Is there a good library/way to do this? research, and work this into teh spec

Specific Text Comments:
1. "1. WHEN a Gibson scan is launched with --graph fla...": shouldnt matter in teh context of this microservice

comments.comment: shouldnt matter in teh context of this microservice
comments.selectedText: 1. WHEN a Gibson scan is launched with --graph flag THEN the system SHALL establish a streaming connection to Davinci service

comments.comment: I need a way for the neo4j cypher, and the microservice API endpoints to stay in sync, and be autogenerated (when the microservice API endpoing changes, it should automatically update cypher schemas).  Is there a good library/way to do this? research, and work this into teh spec
